Our Menu

Discover our delicious range of fresh food, made with love and quality ingredients.

Cafe

Our cafe menu is perfect for a quick bite or a relaxing break with a delicious treat and a refreshing drink.

Coffee small, medium, large £1.50, £2.00, £2.50

Specials

Check out our new Sunday roast dinners, available for delivery and collection every Sunday!

Small dinner

This dinner is the ideal size for children to enjoy. Comes with Yorkshire pudding, meat of your choosing, vegetables, mash and roast potatoes and a side pot of gravy.

Medium dinner

This dinner is ideal size for filling meal. Comes with 2 Yorkshire pudding, healthy helpings of meat of your choosing, vegetables, mash and roast potatoes, stuffing and 2 side pots of gravy.

Large dinner

This dinner is perfect for sharing or if you want to challenge yourself. Comes with 4 Yorkshire pudding, generous portion of meat of your choosing, vegetables, mash and roast potatoes, stuffing, pigs in blankets and 2 large pots of gravy.

Extra Large dinner

This dinner is beast of a dinner ideal for those whoes appetite is not easily satisfied. Very generous portion of meat of your choosing, vegetables, mash and roast potatoes, stuffing, pigs in blankets and 3 large pots of gravy. All served in a giant Yorkshire pudding.
